blocks.text: Barcelona go to Atlético with the title in sight
Barça lead Real Madrid by four points with nine games left. A win at the Metropolitano puts the title within touching distance — and ends Atlético's last mathematical hopes.
♟️ Thu 18:45 — Carlsen opens Grenke Freestyle Open in Karlsruhe
⛳ Thu 06:00 — Valero Texas Open: Ventura & Reitan back in the field after Houston struggles
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest opens; rain enters the biggest stage of 2026
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid, Champions League quarterfinal first leg at the Bernabéu
